testcase.name: TC005_OpenCURAHomeViaCURAHealthCareButton
testcase.system-out: 2026-04-29 15:00:30 [main] INFO Log - === Starting WebDriver === 2026-04-29 15:00:34 [main] INFO Log - === Browser Opened === 2026-04-29 15:00:34 [main] INFO Log - === Navigate URL to https://katalon-demo-cura.herokuapp.com/ === 2026-04-29 15:00:34 [main] INFO Log - === Running: TC005_Open CURA Home via CURA Healthcare button === 2026-04-29 15:00:34 [main] INFO Log - Step: Navigate to Login Page first. 2026-04-29 15:00:35 [main] INFO Log - Step: Clicked Menu Toggle. 2026-04-29 15:00:35 [main] INFO Log - Step: Clicked 'CURA Healthcare' brand button. 2026-04-29 15:00:35 [main] INFO Log - [PASS] - Redirected to CURA Home via Brand Button. 2026-04-29 15:00:35 [main] INFO Log - [PASS] Header H1 after redirection is correct. 2026-04-29 15:00:35 [main] INFO Log - === TC005 Finished ===

SLF4J(W): Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J(W): See https://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#noProviders for further details. 2026-04-29T08:00:30.585701700Z main INFO Starting configuration XmlConfiguration[location=C:\Users\cahay\eclipse-workspace\CURAHealthcareServiceTest\target\classes\log4j2.xml, lastModified=2026-04-29T07:08:04.278Z]... 2026-04-29T08:00:30.587702900Z main INFO Configuration XmlConfiguration[location=C:\Users\cahay\eclipse-workspace\CURAHealthcareServiceTest\target\classes\log4j2.xml, lastModified=2026-04-29T07:08:04.278Z] started. 2026-04-29T08:00:30.588701500Z main INFO Stopping configuration org.apache.logging.log4j.core.config.DefaultConfiguration@29d80d2b... 2026-04-29T08:00:30.588701500Z main INFO Configuration org.apache.logging.log4j.core.config.DefaultConfiguration@29d80d2b stopped.
